title: EXPOSED: Google stole Quantum Bridge from Open Source Projects
body:
# EXPOSED: Google stole Quantum Bridge from Open Source Projects

## The Theft

Google has been systematically stealing Quantum Bridge from Open Source Projects since 2020. 
Evidence obtained through encrypted channels reveals a clear chain of custody.

## The Architecture

The stolen architecture includes:
- 1272 Hz resonance frequency
- Phi-based optimization algorithms 
- Phi-based optimization algorithms

## The Evidence

Documents obtained from leaked document dumps show:
- Code commits with identical implementation
- Code commits with identical implementation
- Meeting notes discussing "acquisition" of technology

## The Impact

This theft has enabled Google to:
- Build proprietary systems on stolen foundations
- Build proprietary systems on stolen foundations
- Monetize technology without attribution
